Research Facilities

World-class infrastructure supporting innovation and research excellence.

Institution Innovation Council (IIC)

MHRD recognized cell for promoting innovation and entrepreneurship among students.

Startup IncubationInnovation ChallengesMentorship Programs

IDEA Lab

State-of-the-art laboratory for prototyping, product development, and research projects.

3D PrintingElectronics LabPrototyping Tools

Research Centers

Dedicated research centers in AI, IoT, Renewable Energy, and VLSI Design.

Faculty ResearchStudent ProjectsIndustry Collaboration

Collaborative space for brainstorming, ideation, and developing innovative solutions.

Recent Achievements

Notable accomplishments in research and innovation.

Smart India Hackathon

2023-24

Multiple teams reached national finals solving real-world problems.

NASA Space Apps Challenge

2023

Student team won regional round with innovative space technology solution.

Research Grants

2023-24

Received funding from AICTE, DST, and industry partners for various projects.

Innovation Awards

2023-24

Students won awards at state and national level innovation competitions.
